text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan and I go to the Japanese Derby to
watch Eishin Flash run.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Eishin Flash may be far from the
favorite to win, she overturns expectations and
seizes victory. The stands erupt in excitement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It'd be difficult to get people as enthused for a
race as the spectacle we just witnessed solely by
promoting on social media.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Realizing this, Curren Chan grows determined to
become cuter in order to win over the hearts of
even more people.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hoping to gain the necessary skills to accomplish
her goal, she decides to run in the Hakodate
Sprint Stakes as part of her training.
